purpose: Original website content for Global Educational Pathways — the family-run, Australia-focused education-counselling brand founded by Sabina Yasmin.
note: Unlike /scraped/ (raw reference content pulled from a competitor site for structural inspiration), everything in this folder is written specifically for this brand — real credentials, real story, real business model. Facts pulled from public/generic sources (AQF levels, visa fee brackets, intake windows) were cross-checked and rewritten in-voice; nothing here is copied verbatim from /scraped/. Content was originally written centered on Sabina personally, then rebranded to lead with 'Global Educational Pathways' as the agency name once the family-team structure was confirmed — Sabina remains the credentialed founder and lead counsellor throughout.

brand.name: Global Educational Pathways

founder.name: Sabina Yasmin
founder.issuedBy: ICEF Academy — Education Agent Training Course (EATC)
founder.role: Founder & Lead Counsellor; Professor, Sydney Imperial Institute

brand.team: See team.json — small family team spanning Bangladesh (operations, website management, student communications) and Sydney, Australia (founder + marketing).

flaggedForConfirmation: Real name for the Marketing (Australia) team member in team.json — currently a dummy placeholder pending the actual name from Mahafuzul.
Real office address(es) and phone/email for both Bangladesh and Sydney — contact-us.json currently uses placeholders consistent with the existing site scaffold (App.tsx uses +61 000 000 000).

Actual partner universities/colleges the agency is accredited to represent — universities.json is left as a structural placeholder, not a real list, since fabricating institution names/logos would misrepresent actual partnerships.
Exact tuition/visa-fee figures in study-in-australia.json are general public figures (subject to change) and should be reviewed before publishing.
Any specific incentive/commission language should be reviewed before publishing — the site copy intentionally avoids naming commission amounts and only states that students are never charged.
Whether 'Global Educational Pathways' is confirmed as final and not already in use/trademarked by another business — worth a quick check before committing to it site-wide.

files.description: Brand + founder story: Sabina's path from head animal doctor in Kushtia and agriculture life with her husband, to self-funded QEAC certification and professorship in Sydney, framed as the origin of Global Educational Pathways
Family team behind the brand: founder/lead counsellor, operations & website management, student communications support, and Sydney-based marketing
Homepage content: hero, why choose us, services overview, study-abroad checklist, FAQs
Service detail sections: primary assessment, application processing, documentation, visa & interview, communication support, post-arrival support
Australia-focused destination page: program durations, cost ranges, intakes, OSHC, visa fees, deadlines
Placeholder structure for the list of Australian universities/colleges the agency can represent students to — needs real data
Standalone FAQ set, including the free-for-students / incentive-based model and 'who will I actually talk to'
Contact details for both the Sydney and Bangladesh sides of the team — currently placeholders pending real office/phone/email
